reason: All 6 test steps executed successfully. Agent "QA-20260630-205246-o6h1" responded to the math question with the correct answer containing "4".
steps: Step 1 - Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the home page showing agent list with sidebar containing "Your Agents" section.
Step 2 - Click on agent "QA-20260630-205246-o6h1" in the sidebar — Successfully clicked the agent link and navigated to the agent's home page (URL: /agents/qa-20260630-205246-o6h1-osugn3yows).
Step 3 - Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (visible in status indicator at top right of page).

Step 5 - Wait up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded very quickly in approximately 1 second. Activity indicator showed "Working..." then the response appeared.

Step 6 - Verify the response mentions "4" and take screenshot — Agent response clearly displayed "2 + 2 = 4" which correctly mentions "4". Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the user message on the right ("Hello! What is 2+2?") and the agent's response in the center ("2 + 2 = 4") with "Worked for 1s" indicating successful completion.
